nodes.context: Criminal organization from Bari, operating in Japigia district, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of businesses and politics.
Criminal faction that joined the Parisi clan in 2017, led by Eugenio Palermiti, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Splinter group led by Antonio Busco that challenged the Parisi-Palermiti clan for drug dealing territories.

edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2017 al clan Parisi si è unito il clan Palermiti, dando vita a una 'società della guerra', nata per sostenere il conflitto scoppiato nel quartiere contro la compagine 'scissionista' capeggiata da Antonio Busco
edges.context: The Parisi clan and Palermiti clan merged in 2017 to form a joint criminal society to fight against a splinter group.

edges.evidence_quote: conflitto scoppiato nel quartiere contro la compagine 'scissionista' capeggiata da Antonio Busco
edges.context: The Parisi clan was in conflict with the splinter group led by Antonio Busco over drug dealing territories.

edges.evidence_quote: conflitto scoppiato nel quartiere contro la compagine 'scissionista' capeggiata da Antonio Busco
edges.context: The Palermiti clan, as part of the merged group, was also in conflict with the splinter group.
